title: PROMOTING AVENUES TO EMPLOYMENT - 211info
text: NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH PROMOTING AVENUES TO EMPLOYMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers job training, paid work experiences, and support for finding jobs and careers. 314 SW 9th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Age 16-24 who are who are at-risk or experiencing housing instability Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 267-4382 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 267-4382 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Youth Employment Programs * At Risk Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - NEW DAY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
